title: Explosive Arrows
description: Plugin adding a custom arrow that explodes on impact
body:
A simple customizable plugin that adds an explosive arrow into the game.

The plugin is very customizable featuring options to control loading the arrow, firing it, and even the resulting explosion.

## Crafting
recipe:
![crafting recipe of the explosive arrow, 1 gunpowder, arrow, and blaze powder surrounded by iron nuggets](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d1159c9b3bb479487901f8357af8c1f694d2540d.png)

this recipe can now be disabled to make it so you can only obtain it via the command via the `enable-recipe` config option in v1.1.0

## Permissions & Commands

```
/explosive <1-64> <opt player>
```
Permission: `explosive.give-arrows`
Give yourself or another player the explosive arrows.
The player at the end is optional, and defaults to whoever is executing the command.

```
/explosive reload
```
Permission: `explosive.reload`
Reload plugin config.
